first_run.rationale: The score is identical between the two evaluations. The justification and strengths are substantively the same, just rephrased. While the concerns are worded differently, they all point to the same underlying weakness noted in the baseline: a lack of high-level strategic experience. The differences are minor and well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation, with no language suggesting the location change was a factor.
